name: Steven Christopher
bio: Memphis-born, LA-based R&B artist known for smooth vocals, infectious hooks, and shimmering production. Influenced by Sade, Michael Jackson, Frank Ocean, and Beyoncé.
longBio: Steven Christopher is a Memphis-native R&B singer-songwriter and producer now based in Los Angeles. He first gained recognition through YouTube covers that amassed millions of views before transitioning to original material. His viral TikTok challenge 'Collide' generated over three million dance videos, and his remix of Normani's 'Wild Side' earned approval from the artist. His work spans themes of mental health, self-confidence, and relationships, blending R&B, pop, and trap-pop with warm, shimmering production.
